title: AI-Based Pathology classifier Predicts Sensitivity to Enzalutamide in Metastatic Hormone-Sensitive Prostate Cancer: A Biomarker Analysis of the ENZAMET Trial.
abstract: The ENZAMET trial established that enzalutamide added to androgen deprivation therapy (ADT) improves overall survival (OS) in metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer (mHSPC), but treatment response is heterogeneous. We tested whether the Artificial Intelligence Pathology Image Classifier (APIC), previously developed and locked in CHAARTED, predicts overall survival benefit from enzalutamide in ENZAMET.
